# EFX-Forms Documentation for AI Assistants

This file provides guidance for AI assistants on how to use the EFX-Forms documentation.

## Documentation Structure

```
docs-site/docs/
├── intro.md                    # Introduction and overview
├── installation.md             # Installation and setup
├── quickstart.md               # Quick start guide
├── examples/
│   ├── basic-form.md          # Basic form examples
│   ├── validation.md          # Validation examples
│   └── advanced.md            # Advanced patterns (conditional rendering, dynamic fields)
├── api/
│   ├── components.md          # Components overview
│   ├── form-component.md      # Form component
│   ├── field-component.md     # Field component
│   ├── form-data-provider.md  # FormDataProvider component
│   ├── field-data-provider.md # FieldDataProvider component
│   ├── if-form-values.md      # IfFormValues conditional rendering
│   ├── if-field-value.md      # IfFieldValue conditional rendering
│   ├── hooks.md               # Hooks overview
│   ├── useForm.md             # useForm hook
│   ├── useField.md            # useField hook
│   ├── useFormData.md         # useFormData hook
│   ├── useFormInstance.md     # useFormInstance hook
│   ├── useFormValues.md       # useFormValues hook
│   ├── useFormMethods.md      # useFormMethods hook
│   ├── useFormStore.md        # useFormStore hook
│   ├── useFormStores.md       # useFormStores hook
│   ├── useFieldData.md        # useFieldData hook
│   ├── useFieldStore.md       # useFieldStore hook
│   ├── useFieldMethods.md     # useFieldMethods hook
│   ├── useStoreProp.md        # useStoreProp hook
│   ├── useStorePropFn.md      # useStorePropFn hook
│   ├── useStoreWatch.md       # useStoreWatch hook
│   └── utilities.md           # Validators and utility functions
└── contributing.md             # Contributing guide
```

## Key Concepts

### Form State Management
- EFX-Forms uses **Effector** for reactive state management
- Form values are stored **flat** (e.g., `{'user.name': 'John'}`)
- Use `shapeFy()` to convert flat to nested: `{user: {name: 'John'}}`
- Use `truthyFy()` to filter out empty values

### Core Components
- `<Form name="form-name">` - Form context provider
- `<Field name="fieldName" Field={Component}>` - Field wrapper with validation
- `<FormDataProvider>` - Subscribe to form values (render props)
- `<FieldDataProvider name="fieldName">` - Subscribe to field values (render props)
- `<IfFormValues check={...}>` - Conditional rendering based on form values
- `<IfFieldValue field="fieldName" check={...}>` - Conditional rendering based on field value

### Core Hooks
- `useForm()` - Get form data and methods combined
- `useFormData()` - Get form state stores (values, errors, etc.)
- `useFormInstance()` - Get raw form instance with all stores
- `useFormValues()` - Get form values only
- `useFormMethods()` - Get form methods only (change, reset, submit)
- `useFormStore('$values')` - Get single form store
- `useFormStores(['$values', '$errors'])` - Get multiple form stores
- `useField('fieldName')` - Get field data and methods combined
- `useFieldData('fieldName')` - Get field state (value, error, dirty, etc.)
- `useFieldStore({store: '$values', name: 'fieldName'})` - Get single field store
- `useFieldMethods('fieldName')` - Get field methods only
- `useStoreProp(store, 'propName')` - Get property from any store
- `useStorePropFn(store, getterFn)` - Get computed value from store
- `useStoreWatch(store, callback)` - Watch store for changes

### Import Paths
```ts
// Core components
import { Form, Field } from 'efx-forms';
import { FormDataProvider } from 'efx-forms/FormDataProvider';
import { FieldDataProvider } from 'efx-forms/FieldDataProvider';
import { IfFormValues } from 'efx-forms/IfFormValues';
import { IfFieldValue } from 'efx-forms/IfFieldValue';

// Hooks
import { useForm } from 'efx-forms/useForm';
import { useField } from 'efx-forms/useField';
import { useFormData } from 'efx-forms/useFormData';
import { useFieldData } from 'efx-forms/useFieldData';
// ... all hooks have dedicated sub-path imports

// Validators
import { required, email, min, max } from 'efx-forms/validators';

// Utilities
import { shapeFy, truthyFy, flattenObjectKeys } from 'efx-forms/utils';
```

## Common Patterns

### Basic Form
```tsx
import { Form, Field } from 'efx-forms';
import { required, email } from 'efx-forms/validators';

const Input = ({ label, error, value, onChange, onBlur, ...props }) => (
  <div>
    <label>{label}</label>
    <input value={value || ''} onChange={onChange} onBlur={onBlur} {...props} />
    {error && <span className="error">{error}</span>}
  </div>
);

const MyForm = () => (
  <Form name="my-form" onSubmit={(values) => console.log(values)}>
    <Field name="email" Field={Input} label="Email" validators={[required(), email()]} />
    <button type="submit">Submit</button>
  </Form>
);
```

### Conditional Rendering
```tsx
import { Form, Field, IfFormValues, IfFieldValue } from 'efx-forms';

// Show/hide based on form values
<IfFormValues check={({ age }) => age >= 18}>
  <Field name="license" Field={Input} label="Driver's License" />
</IfFormValues>

// Show/hide based on field value
<IfFieldValue field="status" check={(value) => value === 'active'}>
  <div>Active content</div>
</IfFieldValue>
```

### Array Fields
```tsx
import { Form, Field } from 'efx-forms';

// Indexed fields
{[0, 1, 2].map((idx) => (
  <Field key={idx} name={`address[${idx}]`} Field={Input} label={`Address ${idx + 1}`} />
))}

// Values: { 'address[0]': 'Line 1', 'address[1]': 'Line 2' }
// Use shapeFy(values) to get: { address: ['Line 1', 'Line 2'] }
```

### Form State Subscription
```tsx
import { Form, FormDataProvider } from 'efx-forms';

<Form name="my-form">
  <FormDataProvider>
    {({ values, errors, dirty, valid }) => (
      <div>
        <pre>{JSON.stringify(values)}</pre>
        <p>Dirty: {String(dirty)}</p>
        <p>Valid: {String(valid)}</p>
      </div>
    )}
  </FormDataProvider>
</Form>
```

## Validation

### Built-in Validators
- `required({ msg?: string })` - Field is required
- `email({ msg?: string })` - Valid email format
- `min(value: number)` - Minimum value
- `max(value: number)` - Maximum value
- `lessThan(value: number)` - Less than value
- `moreThan(value: number)` - More than value
- `length(value: number)` - Exact length
- `matches(regex: RegExp)` - Match pattern
- `positive()` - Positive number
- `negative()` - Negative number
- `number()` - Must be a number

### Custom Validator
```ts
const customValidator = (value: any, values: Record<string, any>) => {
  if (!isValid(value)) {
    return 'Custom error message';
  }
  return false; // false means no error
};
```

## API Reference Priority

When answering questions about EFX-Forms, prioritize these docs:

1. **For component usage**: `api/form-component.md`, `api/field-component.md`
2. **For hooks**: `api/useForm.md`, `api/useField.md`, `api/useFormData.md`
3. **For conditional rendering**: `api/if-form-values.md`, `api/if-field-value.md`
4. **For examples**: `examples/basic-form.md`, `examples/validation.md`, `examples/advanced.md`
5. **For utilities**: `api/utilities.md` (validators, shapeFy, truthyFy)

## Version Information

- **Current Version**: 2.x (check package.json for exact version)
- **Breaking Changes**: v2 has breaking changes from v1
- **Peer Dependencies**: react, effector, effector-react, lodash
- **Build**: Dual CJS/ESM (mjs build included)

## Additional Resources

- **Effector Documentation**: https://effector.dev
- **Effector React**: https://effector.dev/api/effector-react
- **Documentation Site**: https://darianstlex.github.io/efx-forms
- **Main Repository**: https://github.com/darianstlex/efx-forms
